scripts.css:build: cd src && pnpm exec rsbuild build --environment css
scripts.build:js: cd src && pnpm exec rsbuild build --environment js
scripts.watch:css: cd src && pnpm exec rsbuild build --environment css --watch
scripts.watch:js: cd src && pnpm exec rsbuild build --environment js --watch
scripts.i18n:extract: tsx src/script/extract-ucode.ts --generate && luci-types i18n -i package/luci-theme-fluent/htdocs/luci-static/resources -i src/script/.cache/extra-strings.js --po package/luci-theme-fluent/po/templates/fluent.pot -p luci-theme-fluent
scripts.i18n:export: tsx src/script/extract-ucode.ts --generate && dotenvx run -- luci-types i18n -i package/luci-theme-fluent/htdocs/luci-static/resources -i src/script/.cache/extra-strings.js --po package/luci-theme-fluent/po/zh_Hans/fluent.po -l zh_Hans -p luci-theme-fluent --merge --translate --batch-size 20 --prompt src/script/translate.md
scripts.i18n:export:fa: tsx src/script/extract-ucode.ts --generate && dotenvx run -- luci-types i18n -i package/luci-theme-fluent/htdocs/luci-static/resources -i src/script/.cache/extra-strings.js --po package/luci-theme-fluent/po/fa/fluent.po --locale fa -p luci-theme-fluent --merge --translate --batch-size 20 --prompt src/script/translate.fa.md
scripts.i18n:export:ru: tsx src/script/extract-ucode.ts --generate && dotenvx run -- luci-types i18n -i package/luci-theme-fluent/htdocs/luci-static/resources -i src/script/.cache/extra-strings.js --po package/luci-theme-fluent/po/ru/fluent.po --locale ru -p luci-theme-fluent --merge --translate --batch-size 20 --prompt src/script/translate.ru.md
scripts.i18n:build: pnpm run i18n:extract-ucode && pnpm run i18n:extract && pnpm run i18n:export && pnpm run i18n:export:fa && pnpm run i18n:export:ru
scripts.screenshot: pnpm run screenshot:run && pnpm run screenshot:showcase && pnpm run screenshot:run:zh-Hans && pnpm run screenshot:showcase:zh-Hans
